overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing the protagonist walking along ancient Greek stone fortifications at the Port of Piraeus during nighttime. The character carries an eagle companion on their arm before releasing it, then ascends a long stone staircase into a fortified building.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone fortification wall overlooking port city

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone battlement wall with an eagle perched on the left arm, overlooking the ancient port city below

notable_agents.action: eagle perched on character's forearm, wings partially spread, looking around

entered.detail: ancient weathered stone wall with rectangular merlons along the top edge
tall evergreen tree with dense foliage growing alongside the wall
distant view of ancient Greek city with temples and buildings along the coastline
square stone tower with crenellations rising above the wall line

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an ancient stone fortification wall at night, overlooking the distant lights of the Port of Piraeus. An eagle companion remains perched on the character's arm as they move along the pathway lined with Mediterranean pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone walkway approaching fortified building entrance

events.description: eagle takes flight from character's arm and flies away into the night sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the stone pathway toward a fortified building entrance after the eagle departs

entered.detail: long flight of stone steps leading up to a fortified entrance
metal fire basket burning with orange flames providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The eagle companion takes flight and leaves the character's arm. The character continues walking along the stone wall toward a fortified building, approaching a long staircase. A lit brazier burns on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep stone staircase leading to fortified building entrance

events.description: character begins ascending the steep stone staircase toward the building entrance
character reaches the top of the stairs and enters the stone building through the wooden doorway

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep stone stairs toward the illuminated doorway at the top of the fortification

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal studs set in a stone archway, illuminated by torchlight from within
burning torch mounted on the stone wall beside the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the long stone staircase toward the fortified building entrance. The walls rise on both sides creating an enclosed corridor. At the top, a wooden doorway illuminated by wall torches marks the entrance to the interior, which the character enters at the end of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime fortification wall that leads from an open coastal vista into the enclosed entrance of a fortified building. It begins with the character walking past Mediterranean pine trees, overlooking the distant lights of the Port of Piraeus with an eagle perched on their arm. As the eagle takes flight and disappears into the night, the camera follows the character toward a long staircase, passing a burning brazier that casts a warm glow on the stone path. The scene then shifts as the character ascends the stairs, with the surrounding walls rising to create a narrow, enclosed corridor. Finally, the movement concludes as the character reaches the top of the stairs and enters a wooden doorway illuminated by flickering wall torches.
